title: PDSS Intent Vocabulary
description: Universal intent schema for Pest-Deterrent Safety Systems (PDSS). Compatible with Matter, MQTT, and BACnet. Enforces safety constraints at the data layer.

metadata.description: Message routing and versioning information. Aligns with Matter Transaction ID and MQTT Correlation Data.

schema_version.description: Immutable schema version for compatibility checking.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds. Used for Lyapunov residual time-step validation.

device_did.description: Decentralized Identifier (Bostrom DID) binding this intent to a specific hardware root of trust.

transaction_id.description: Unique ID for audit logging and shard reconciliation.

deterrent_intent.description: The core abstract command. Never contains raw hardware codes (PWM/IR). Must be translated by adapter layer.

profile_id.description: Pre-defined deterrent strategy (e.g., 'bedbug_thermal_low'). Maps to CorridorBands in Rust kernel.

target_species.description: Latin name or common group (e.g., 'cimex_lectularius', 'rodent'). Used for ecological impact tracking.

intensity_pct.description: Normalized actuation strength. 0.0 = OFF, 1.0 = Max Safe Limit. Validated against CorridorBands.

duty_cycle.description: Temporal activation ratio. Used to reduce energy consumption and average emissions.

schedule_window.description: Optional time bounds. Enforced by gateway to prevent nighttime noise violations.

modality_override.description: Optional constraint to limit actuation to specific physical modalities.

safety_attestation.description: Cryptographic proof that this intent passed the Rust Safety Kernel's invariant checks.

kernel_approved.description: True only if BugsLifeSafetyKernel::safestep() returned Approved or Derated.

lyapunov_residual.description: Current V_t value. Must be non-increasing over time (V_t+1 <= V_t).

corridor_status.description: Current risk coordinate status. 'hard_violation' must block actuation.

ker_scores.description: Knowledge/Eco-Impact/Residual Risk triad. Drives deployment eligibility.

attestation_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the decision signed by device private key. Verifiable on DeterrentNodeShard.

telemetry_config.description: Configuration for feedback data used in Adaptive Logic Network (ALN) learning.

report_interval_ms.description: Frequency of sensor data upload for envelope refinement.

include_power_data.description: If true, include energy consumption metrics for Eco-Impact scoring.

include_sensor_raw.description: If true, include raw sensor vectors (noise, temp) for corridor validation.
